hero.title: Where comfort meets
hero.subtitle: Located in the heart of Yaoundé, L'Escale Verte welcomes you in a setting blending elegance and modernity. Business or leisure stays, our team is at your service.

services.title: Everything for your comfort
services.subtitle: L'Escale Verte provides quality services to make your stay unforgettable.

restaurant.name: Restaurant
restaurant.desc: Cameroonian & international cuisine. Breakfast available on request. Open every day.

pool.name: Swimming Pool
pool.desc: Outdoor pool accessible to all residents. Open 7 days a week, 7am to 9pm.

conference.name: Conference Room
conference.desc: Modular room for up to 50 people, fully equipped for your seminars and events.

wifi.name: Premium WiFi
wifi.desc: High-speed connection throughout the property, at no extra charge.

reception.name: 24/7 Reception
reception.desc: Our team is available around the clock to meet your needs.

parking.name: Secure Parking
parking.desc: Private secured parking available to all hotel guests.

rooms.title: Rooms & suites
rooms.subtitle: Two room categories to suit all your stays, each designed for your comfort.

standard.name: Standard Room
standard.desc: Essential comfort in a refined setting. Ideal for short stays and business travel.

deluxe.name: Deluxe Room
deluxe.desc: Generous space, premium finishes and a view of the tropical garden. Perfect for an exceptional stay.

testimonials.title: What our guests say
testimonials.subtitle: Discover experiences from our guests coming from around the world.

items.text: A hotel that truly exceeds expectations for a 3-star. The pool is magnificent and the staff is very attentive. Highly recommend for business stays.
items.name: Samuel O.

items.text: 5-day stay for a seminar. The conference room is perfectly equipped. The restaurant offers great local dishes. Excellent value for money.
items.name: Marie-Claire F.

items.text: Very pleasant surprise! The hotel is clean, WiFi works perfectly and the reception is very responsive. I'll definitely return on my next trips to Yaoundé.
items.name: Jean-Paul N.

about.title: L'Escale Verte,
about.titleHighlight: a hotel in the heart of Yaoundé
about.story: Founded with the passion for offering quality accommodation in the heart of the Cameroonian capital, L'Escale Verte was born from a vision of a place where tropical elegance meets modern comfort. Since its opening, the hotel has welcomed business travelers, tourists and families in a warm and refined atmosphere.
about.story2: Our dedicated team is committed to making every stay memorable, combining authentic Cameroonian hospitality with international 3-star standards.

values.name: Excellence
values.desc: High standards in every detail of your stay.

values.name: Hospitality
values.desc: Authentic Cameroonian welcome at the service of each guest.

values.name: Sustainability
values.desc: An environmental commitment for responsible tourism.

chambres.title: Rooms & suites
chambres.subtitle: Two accommodation categories designed for your comfort, whether you're on a business or leisure trip.
chambres.standardDesc: Our Standard room offers all the essential comfort for a pleasant stay. Air-conditioned, equipped with a TV screen and high-speed WiFi connection, it is ideal for short business trips or transit stays.
chambres.deluxeDesc: The Deluxe room offers a more generous space with high-end finishes. Enjoy a view of the tropical garden, a stocked minibar and a bathroom with bathtub. Ideal for extended stays.

servicesPage.title: A complete experience
servicesPage.subtitle: From the pool to the restaurant, through the conference room, L'Escale Verte offers everything you need.
servicesPage.restaurantDesc: Our restaurant offers quality Cameroonian and international cuisine. The chef creates menus inspired by local flavors and international trends. Continental or African breakfast is available on request from 6am to 10am.
servicesPage.poolDesc: Our outdoor pool is a true haven of peace, surrounded by tropical vegetation. Accessible to all residents at no extra charge, it is open every day from 7am to 9pm.
servicesPage.conferenceDesc: Our modular conference room can accommodate up to 50 people. Fully equipped (projector, screen, audio system, dedicated WiFi), it is suitable for business meetings, seminars and training sessions.

services.name: Premium WiFi
services.desc: High-speed connection throughout the property, at no extra charge.

services.name: 24/7 Reception
services.desc: Our team is available around the clock.

services.name: Daily Housekeeping
services.desc: Housekeeping and linen renewal every day.

services.name: Coworking Space
services.desc: Equipped shared workspace in the lobby.
